title: Excessively net-positive person
html:
Excessively net-positive person

Stub. Yahir's stated life-mission framing — that the goal is not just to be net-positive in impact but excessively so. First explicit verbatim appearance in 2023 01 30 eli internship (Google Doc); the underlying disposition is also legible in 2019 09 17 money means nothing do what you love and want to do ("money means nothing — do what you love"), the earliest aphorism that prefigures the same instinct. Companion to financial freedom (the prerequisite) and debt of gratitude (the obligation). Promote to full concept page on 3rd corpus mention.

Source mentions

  • 2023 01 30 eli internship — explicit verbatim use
  • 2019 09 17 "money means nothing" — proto-version

Related

  • financial freedom
  • debt of gratitude
  • impact evolution (concept-grade implied; not yet a page — see 2018 10 09 impact evolution note)
  • excessively net positive person
